items.name: Sarah M.
items.text: My son was always just playing Minecraft. Now he's actually building mods and learning Python! The pirate theme keeps him engaged.

items.name: Thomas K.
items.text: The progress in just 3 months is amazing. Lena went from zero coding experience to building her own mini-game. Highly recommend!

items.name: Maria W.
items.text: Perfect for young kids. Tom loves the treasure hunt approach to learning. He doesn't even realize he's learning programming!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our coding academy

items.question: What age groups do you teach?
items.answer: We teach children aged 6-14. Our courses are divided into three levels: Beginner (6-8), Intermediate (8-11), and Advanced (11-14).

items.question: Do I need to buy Minecraft?
items.answer: We use Minecraft Education Edition, which we provide free for all students. You just need a computer with internet access.

items.question: Are the classes online or in-person?
items.answer: We offer both online and in-person classes. Online sessions are conducted via Zoom with screen sharing. In-person classes are in Berlin.

items.question: What programming languages will my child learn?
items.answer: Start with block-based coding, progress to Python, then JavaScript and full-stack development. All through Minecraft modding!

items.question: How long does each course last?
items.answer: Each level is 12 weeks. After completion, students receive a certificate and can advance to the next level.

items.question: Can we try before committing?
items.answer: Absolutely! We offer a free trial session. Book via Calendly and discover the adventure!
